title: Mirage
content:
The intense focus of light
        but pointillism,
        into this juncture bits of light
        surround rough, inverted sky -
        dawn is their message
        unfurled about
        the alumni apparatus
        of incensed eyes
        and whispered sun.

        The heavy mirage of dots,
        landscape locked
        Seurat, a frieze of summer heat
        choking water lilies -
        the sun as a crystal ship
        adrift across
        bedlam-sponsored
        random dots.
meaning:
"Mirage" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
